'''√sh-m-j''' ('''kashamaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cun|cun]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-m-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cun|cun]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √sh-m-j
|-
! Lemma
| kashamaj
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thishamaj || jishamaj || shishamaj || kishamaj
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthushamaj || jujushamaj || shushushamaj || kukushamaj
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thushamaj || jushamaj || shushamaj || kushamaj
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thushamaj || jushamaj || shushamaj || kushamaj
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || theshamaj || jeshamaj || sheshamaj || keshamaj
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothoshamaj || jojoshamaj || shoshoshamaj || kokoshamaj
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thoshamaj || joshamaj || shoshamaj || koshamaj
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thoshamaj || joshamaj || shoshamaj || koshamaj
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || shamaj || shamaj || shamaj || shamaj
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || shamaj || shamaj || shamaj || shamaj
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || shamaj || shamaj || shamaj || shamaj
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || shamaj || shamaj || shamaj || shamaj
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæshamaj || jæshamaj || shæshamaj || kæshamaj
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathashamaj || jajashamaj || shashashamaj || kakashamaj
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thashamaj || jashamaj || shashamaj || kashamaj
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thashamaj || jashamaj || shashamaj || kashamaj
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shashamaj
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshashamaj
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishashamaj
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shashamajnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshashamajnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishashamajnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shashamajshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshashamajnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishashamajshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shashamajro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshashamajnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishashamajro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shashamajmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshashamajnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishashamajmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shashamajsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshashamajnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishashamajsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shashamajng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshashamajnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishashamajng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shashamajya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshashamajnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishashamajya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shashamajyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshashamajnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishashamajyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shashamajnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshashamajnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishashamajnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shashamajnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshashamajnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishashamajnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shashamajnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshashamajnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishashamajnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shashamajshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshashamajnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishashamajshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shashamajshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshashamajnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishashamajshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shashamajshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshashamajnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishashamajshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shashamajronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshashamajnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishashamajronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shashamajroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshashamajnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishashamajroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shashamajromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshashamajnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishashamajromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shashamajmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshashamajnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishashamajmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shashamajmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshashamajnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishashamajmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shashamajmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshashamajnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishashamajmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
